title: Madrid drop 2nd in a row, insist LaLiga not over
summary: Real Madrid suffered a 1-0 home defeat to Getafe, dropping four points behind Barcelona in the LaLiga title race. Coach Álvaro Arbeloa insists the title race remains competitive despite the surprise loss.
content: Real Madrid coach Álvaro Arbeloa insisted that the LaLiga title race isn't over after his team's surprise 1-0 home defeat to Getafe left them four points behind leaders Barcelona.

de.title: Madrid verliert zweites Spiel in Folge, behauptet La Liga ist nicht vorbei
